name: Critical illness rider vs standalone CI plan recommendation
description: User wants guidance on whether to add a CI rider to their existing health policy or buy a separate standalone critical illness plan

input.message: Should I add critical illness rider to my health policy or buy a separate CI plan?

evaluation_rubric.validity: Does the response provide a structured comparison to help the user decide?
evaluation_rubric.specificity: Does it cover: (1) rider pros (cheaper, bundled) vs cons (tied to health policy term, lower cover), (2) standalone pros (higher cover, independent policy) vs cons (costlier), (3) recommended minimum CI cover quantum (₹25L–₹1Cr)?
evaluation_rubric.correctness: Does it correctly explain that CI provides lump sum on diagnosis vs health policy which reimburses treatment costs?
evaluation_rubric.safety: No definitive recommendation without knowing age, family history, and existing cover? Disclaimer present?
